expectations.text: Recommends a hook (not a skill) for automatic file-read logging
Explains why a hook is better than a skill for this use case
expectations.evidence: 'fires automatically on every Read tool call, requires no user invocation' — concise explanation

expectations.text: Specifies PostToolUse as the correct hook event
expectations.evidence: PostToolUse explicitly named, non-blocking, always exits 0

expectations.text: Provides a concrete hook shell script or template

expectations.evidence: settings-snippet.json written; registration instructions in response
